title: Community Moderation Update: 2026-04-29
body: Today we resolved two high-severity abuse reports: 1) User 'spam_wave_42' was banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels. 2) User 'toxic_runner' was banned for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers. Reports involving trusted team members are being handled separately. We will continue to prioritize community safety and enforce our code of conduct consistently.
